zh.lifeSummary: 當George Crooke於1520年出生在英國藍卡爾布林德爾時，他的父親Anthony Crook33歲，母親Joan Dick Crooke32歲。他於1544年7月20日與Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe在英國藍卡爾可洛斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1590年8月17日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年70歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Crooke于1520年出生在英国藍卡爾布林德爾时，他的父亲Anthony Crook33岁，母亲Joan Dick Crooke32岁。他于1544年7月20日与Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe在英国藍卡爾可洛斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1590年8月17日在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年70岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可。

nameMeanings.name: Crooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Crook
meanings: topographic name from Old Norse krókr ‘nook or bend’ denoting someone who lived by a bend in a river or road. In some instances the surname may have arisen as a habitational name from any of the places called Crook in Cumberland and Durham, or Crooke in Lancashire, all of which are derived from this word.

topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) barrow or mound’ from Brittonic crüg. In some instances this may have arisen as a habitational name from either Crook in Combe Raleigh or perhaps Crooke in North Tawton (both Devon), which are derived from this word.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When George Crooke was born in 1520, in Brindle, Lancashire, England, his father, Anthony Crook, was 33 and his mother, Joan Dick Crooke, was 32. He married Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe on 20 July 1544, in Croston, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 17 August 1590, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Crooke est né en 1520, à Brindle, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Anthony Crook, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Dick Crooke, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe le 20 juillet 1544, à Croston, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 17 août 1590, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre.

Juli 1544 in Croston, Lancashire, England Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 17. it.lifeSummary: Quando George Crooke è nato il nel 1520 nel Brindle, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Anthony Crook, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Joan Dick Crooke, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe il 20 luglio 1544, nel Croston, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 17 agosto 1590, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Ormskirk, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: George Crookeが1520年にイギリスランカシュアイアブリンドルで生まれた時，父Anthony Crookは33歳，母Joan Dick Crookeは32歳であった。1544年7月20日にイギリスランカシュアイアクロストンでMargaret Alice Burscoe Burstoeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1590年8月17日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで70歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアオルムスキルクにて埋葬された。

ko.Bolton le Moors St Peter, Lancashire, En: 영국 랭카실르 볼턴 일 무르스 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: George Crooke(이)가 1520년 영국 랭카실르 브린들일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anthony Crook(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Dick Crooke(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1544년 7월 20일 영국 랭카실르 크로스턴에서 Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1590년 8월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 오스커크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Crooke nasceu em 1520, em Brindle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Anthony Crook, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Dick Crooke, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe em 20 de julho de 1544, em Croston, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1590, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.Bolton le Moors St Peter, Lancashire, En: болтон л мурс ст питир, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Crooke родился в 1520 г. в местности бриндл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Anthony Crook было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Dick Crooke, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe 20 июля 1544 г. в местности кростон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 17 августа 1590 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Crooke nació en 1520, en Brindle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Anthony Crook, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Dick Crooke, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe el 20 de julio de 1544, en Croston, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1590, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
